scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter api test && corepack pnpm --filter @ticketing/contracts test && corepack pnpm --filter admin test && corepack pnpm --filter miniapp test && corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/workspace/repo-layout.spec.ts
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm -r --if-present lint && corepack pnpm exec eslint tests --ext .ts
